affected_pattern: Recurring charges posted on both the 1st and the 2nd of the month for a subset of accounts
root_cause: Scheduler retry without idempotency — the invoicing job failed at 23:59 on the 1st, was restarted at 00:01 on the 2nd by the watchdog, and both runs posted recurring charges since the idempotency key was derived from the run timestamp.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Scheduler Retry Idempotency Defect pattern
Watchdog log shows job restart two minutes after failure
Idempotency key uses wall-clock date rather than logical billing date
recommended_action: Reverse the duplicate postings on the 2nd
Change idempotency key to (account_id, billing_cycle_id) deterministically
Make the invoicing job a pure function of inputs to allow safe retry
Add a post-run assertion that charge count == expected account count
